title: SporeCore
body:
![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-2.8.2-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitbook)
![Author](https://img.shields.io/badge/author-ClearedSpore-purple?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)
[![Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/Wiki-Click%20Me-success?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitbook)](https://spore-plugins.gitbook.io/sporecore)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Now!-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](http://discord.gg/V2ZTgEr3M8)

### 🚀 What is SporeCore?
SporeCore is a plugin with over 90 commands and so many more to come!
The plugin also has the following:
- Vault Economy. SporeCore is the core plugin for the Vault Economy.
- Homes
- Warps
- Kits
- Discord
- Inventory
- StaffMode
- Vanish
- Many commands
- Custom currency. SporeCore has a premium currency feature that you can use. Find more info [here](https://spore-plugins.gitbook.io/sporecore)

### 🎨 Color code support:
The plugin supports the following color codes:
- MiniMessages (<red> <b> <blue>)
- Legacy (&c, &e, &l)
- RGGBB (&#9C68D9)

### 🪲 Bugs?
If you have any bugs you can report them in my discord server:
#### [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Now!-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](http://discord.gg/V2ZTgEr3M8)
